message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement live metrics with health indicators

- Add LiveMetric struct with value tracking, health state, trend,
  sliding window history, and hysteresis for state transitions
- Add MetricHealth (Ok/Warning/Error) and MetricTrend (Up/Flat/Down) enums
- Add DashboardMetrics with requests/sec, p95 latency, error rate,
  job throughput metrics
- Add MetricHealthChanged notifications for health state transitions
- Integrate live metrics into Simulation tick loop
- Update Dashboard to use Simulation for live data with tick-based updates
- Add render_live_metrics panel showing real-time metrics with
  health indicators and trend arrows
- Platform status now reflects both service health AND metric health
- Add 16 new tests for live metrics system (240 tests pass)

Implements bd-2myg: Dashboard live metrics + status indicators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
